description: Product Description Wooden Spinning Top - 40 Pack - BONNYCO A pack of 40 wooden spinning top for non-stop fun. Featuring charming designs of various jungle animals. They come in individual bags! These spinning tops come in pre-filled bags, ready to be handed out , so you won't have to spend time preparing them - we've got it covered! They make for unique gifts as party bag fillers for kids or little presents at various events such as communions, weddings, Valentine's Day, end-of-term or trimester gifts for primary school students. They are also ideal for kids' party favours and pinata filler, advent calendars, Christmas stocking fillers kids, or even Easter eggs. The bags are opaque, so the excitement of discovering which of the little animals they've got will be truly thrilling. Among the animals, they will find lions, hippos, elephants, crocodiles, toucans, koalas, monkeys, giraffes, pandas, and leopards. Surprise boys and girls with these spinning tops that they will undoubtedly love and have a lot of fun with. You'll become the best host! 40 Wooden Spinning Tops with 10 different animal designs, each four times! What does this set contain? 40 spinning tops Surprise your guests with these kids party bags fillers. It will be super fun to challenge each other to see which spinning top lasts the longest. Which one will spin longer, the lion, the crocodile...? 40 bags The spinning tops come ready to be handed out in these opaque green kids party bag fillers, making it a surprise package . What's inside will remain a secret until they finally open them. Discover which jungle animal you've got! Beautifully Packaged for Gifting The spinning tops and bags come in a beautifully detailed packaging that makes it perfect for Christmas, birthdays , and more.. A box with 40 spinning tops, perfect for gifting on any occasion Why Choose the BONNYCO 40 Gyros Jungle Pack? Rounded Tips Thanks to their rounded tips, these children's spinning tops spin perfectly on a flat surface. They won't be able to stop spinning them! Splinter-Free Each wooden spinning toys is made of high-quality rubberwood , sturdy, durable, and splinter-free. Kids can play for hours with complete safety and peace of mind. Smooth Edges Smooth finishes to make playing with these spinning tops a comfortable and enjoyable experience for the little ones. Fun spinning tops that allow children to learn about animals, colors, develop their imagination, improve their active participation, social skills, sharing abilities, and much more. These spinning tops are a fantastic gift that appeals to both kids and adults. Below, you can see more of our BONNYCO products for party bag fillers for kids!
